subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us, praise be unto God, adorned with the ornament of love and embellished with the light of recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آنجناب رسید لله الحمد بطراز محبت مطرز بود و بنور معرفت مزین از حق
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
